programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 3.0m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h NE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 15.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 2.8m and that wind, best watch the closeouts from the cafe, unless you fancy a washing machine cycle.
